data.ConfigJson: {"ID":211001047,"TalkGroupID":211000647,"NpcIndex":0,"IntervalSecs":[2,2],"WaitSecs":5,"TalkDescKey":0,"DialogOptionID":[211000630,211001173],"TalkDescEditor":"道友，在下近日修行之时顿觉处处堵塞，不知道友可愿与我斗法一番，助我打破桎梏？","FixIntervalSecs":2,"RandomIntervalSecMin":2,"RandomIntervalSecMax":2}

{"ID":211000892,"TalkGroupID":211000722,"NpcIndex":0,"IntervalSecs":[2,2],"WaitSecs":5,"TalkDescKey":0,"TalkDescEditor":"没想到你的功夫如此了得，在下甘拜下风。与你斗法，我也获益颇多，这点你就收下吧，我也该回去继续修行了。","FixIntervalSecs":2,"RandomIntervalSecMin":2,"RandomIntervalSecMax":2}
